resources.string: Set this payment method is default
Allow buy when product is out of stock
You have reviewed for this service already.
In some sentences, share your review about this service
With this role, Sale members can see and reply customer’s messages and product inquiries
We only use your information for your registration to order our products (Form title)

By clicking Submit, you agree to send your information to the advertiser who agrees to use it according to their privacy policy.\nAccessed will also use it subject to our data policy, including to auto-fill forms for ads.
Your contact information is only shared with the advertiser if you submit the form. Prefilled contact information can come from your profile.
Add some reasons for your decision
All appointments need to approve by Admin
Anyone can book appointment times that already have bookings
Do you want to delete this Service?
Are you sure to hide this Service?
This service will not be shown to people when they book an appointment
Select people or enter their name
Your appointment request will be sent to %s for confirmation

Everyone use this to invite other like your page
Everyone use this to create appointment request to your page. You can set appointment settings as the time, services, auto approve or not…
Everyone can send messages to your page. You can manage all income message
Do you want to change the %s button to the %s button?
Choose the button you would like people to take. It will be shown at the button tab of page
Your confirm password is not match. Please check again.
We will send you verification code.\nPlease check your primary email.
This code is expired after 60 seconds
Are you sure to leave this group?
Are you sure to delete this conversation?
After you archive this chat group, you and others will not see and interact anything with this chat group. You can\'t recover it anymore.
Do you sure to archive this chat group?
%s and you will not receives or calls together. All messages sent during the block will be hidden when you unblock. You will be able to see, message and call each other in the same group you joined.

You and %s won't be connected anymore.
%s also will be block on chat.
%s will not be able to:
- See your post
- Search you for somethings
I just sent you a recommendation for your profile.
I have just accepted your recommendation
Do you want to delete this comment?
Do you want to discard comment?
There are not any message yet.
Cannot communicate with server right now!
Report sent. Thanks for your contribution!
Location Service is off. Please turn it on to use this feature.

Choose the wrong type of image
Have sent the username to your email. Please check your email!
File size must be less than 3Mb
Start time must be less than end time
Max 20 images. Please remove some images/videos before add more
Your trust is our top concerns, so companies cannot alter or remove reviews.
Be the first to add salary
Be the first to share a story

Anyone can see group’s members, posts

After you archive this group, members still can view the group, but they can\'t interact anything. You can unarchive to re-operate this group anytime.

You cannot select more than %1$d images

plurals.name: imagePickerMultiMore
plurals.item: You have to select one more image
You have to select %1$d more images

resources.string: You are looking for a job?
Let\'s start discovering jobs with Accessed.
We help you connect with many companies, friends and jobs on the world.
Find the perfect fit for you.
You have no any contacts to connect right now. Let\'s try again after you have more contacts.
Applying to this application won\'t change your profile.
Follow %s to find out other open positions.

A job description is an internal document that clearly states the essential job requirements, job duties, job responsibilities, and skills required to perform a specific role. A more detailed job description will cover how success is measured in the role so it can be used during performance evaluations. They are also known as a job specification, job profiles, JD, and position description (job PD). Our job description directory contains job description examples covering all the most popular roles. We have examples of job descriptions you can quickly download and modify to suit your unique business requirements. You\'ll find a job description example for most common jobs.
Give a recommendation/review to your connection
Competitive intelligence about other applications base on Accessed data
You are in the top %s of %d applicants base on your profile
You have %d in %d top skills among all other applicants
Upgrade your account to compare what job is better fit to you
Start looking for your next career
Enter a few words to search
Are you sure make as sold selected product(s)?
Are you sure inactive selected product(s)?
Are you sure to delete selected product(s)?
Are you sure to active selected product(s)?
After you unlink to %s Account, you will not able to login by %s. Are you sure to unlink it?
Upgrade Your Account to Gain Access to New Features
You can not select any more media
Some media could not be selected
Do you want to discard post?
You have more than %1$d images selected…
All of items selected will be remove. Do you want to make this change?
These are notifications to remind you of when someone endorses you, view your profile
You will receive notifications of Jobs that you may be interested or applied.
These notifications to remind you incoming events, help you to know event updates, invitations…
Event that you may be interested
To notify you who want to connect, invite you to follow or join the group that you may be like,…
Who invited you to join /follow others
Suggestion me what I maybe interested
There are notifications to you know activities from your connections, post, comments,…
Notify to you new updates from connections
Who wrote something to reply you
Who shared yours on their feeds
1 person viewed your profile at anonymous
%s people viewed your profile at anonymous
%s and %d others sent you connection invitations
Job at %s that you may be interested in

You look like a good fit for %s at %s
%s invited you to join %s - Test Scheduled - %s
%s rejected your invitation to join event %s
%s sent you an offer for the job %s
Job Alert: We have 1 new job for %s in %s
Job Alert: We have new jobs for %s in %s
%s and %s others you may know from %s
%s and %d others endorsed you for a skill %s
%s and %d others endorsed you for skill: %s and %d other skills
Endorse other people in your network
Sorry! have a trouble while download this file.
Are you sure to cancel this subscription?
You can not back to the subscription %s again after upgraded to %s. Do you want to make this change?
Save card data for future payments
Are you sure you want to unlink this page?
Are you sure you want to delete this page?
to be the new owner of the page
By this change, you will not have any permission to manage this page. Please confirm your change in the next step.
Select role to share page management permission to them
With this role, this person will be become as a location manager. He can manage services, staffs, customers and appointments for above location
With this role, member as a page employee. They will be listed in staff list for appointment service
By this change, Admins of %s will be able to manage this page, create post, delete post. Your page will also be listed on %s.\nYou can remove link anytime.
Do you want to remove this location?
You can manage your business lots staffs with more than 1 service and multi locations by this function.
This step is very importance to launch your services to market. Anyone can see your service listing for booking appointment.
To run this page with appointment service. You need to complete appointment setting for notification, interval time and double booking…
There are\'nt staffs available right now.
You have requested %s to be the new owner of %s
Do you want to delete this payment method?
Further payment for your active subscriptions is not possible using this method
Set one method is default before you delete this
Are you sure to want to this payment method is default?
What do you want to survey?
Answers you want to get from others
We don\'t allow request for political opinions, medical information or other sensitive data.
Do you want to discard poll?
Anyone can see this poll final result.
Create poll and ask the others \nabout their opinions
Are you sure to end this poll?
Everyone will not be able to vote after poll is ended.

string-array.name: lb_privacy_options
string-array.item: Who can see when you are online
Profile viewing when you viewed others profile

resources.string: Select what others see when you viewed their profile
You can return this product if you have not yet opened package cover
In some sentences, share your review about this product
You have %s pending incoming recommendations to accept
By clicking Accept button, this recommendation will be display on your profile.
Do you want to delete this recommendation?
Write something to your connection for
Are you sure discard this request?
Include a private message about what revisions you are asking for
Hello %s, Can you please revise your recommendation for me? Could you change…
Include a private message with your request
Hello %s\n\nCould you please write a review for my profile?
Hello %s\n\nCould you please write a recommendation for my profile?
Please choose your year of experience at %1$s.
Please choose your job function at %1$s.
Pay may vary based on location, years of experiences, and/or other factors
Are you sure to want to leave this school?
Are you sure to want to leave this company?
Please input a valid user to search
Please input correct %s\'s email to send invite
This service is not available right now.
Input your review about this service
Buyers can use your quick suggested question for products that they are interested in
This step is very important to launch your services to market. Anyone can see your products on marketplace.
Upgrade your shop to manage more information and content (cover, search product, feeds) so that customers can see your feeds when you publish new product.
Do you want to archive this shop?
After you archive this shop, you and others will not see and interact anything with this shop. You can not recover it anymore.
Add shop to sell your product
Manage shop more information by add shop cover, feeds, multi locations
Application\'s cache will be clear include current your login session. Do you want to perform this action?
By creating an account you agree to our
Minimum eight characters, at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number and one special character
Please help us to know about %1$s\'s skill of %2$s (Optional)
How do you know about %1$s\'s skill of %2$s?
Your cancellation will become effective at the end of your current billing period. You will not receive a refund or prorated.
Please update payment method or auto payments for subscription may be disrupted from %s
Please update payment method or auto payments for subscription may be disrupted from %s
Tell your friends about the app so that\nthey\'ll see your messages faster
Many people are already join us
Employers can contact when you apply for a job
Highlight your unique experience and education
Update your skills for mapping more jobs
Do you want to set your file name?
Are you sure to remove this education?
Are you sure to remove this experience?
Are you sure to remove this certificate?
Tell us where you have used this skill
75% of employers value the context in which skills are applied. Select at least one item to indicate where you have used this skill.
Hello %s, Could you please write me a recommendation for my profile?
Do you want to discard this comment about %s?
Enter the verification code we just sent\nyou on your valid email account
If you didn\'t receive the code?
In one sentence, describe your experience at %1$s.
What are the best reasons to work here?\nDescribe things you like about %1$s.
What are some of challenges of working here?
Share some advice with upper management.
I agree to Accessed Term of Use. This review of my experience at my current or former employer is truthful.
. This review of my experience at my current or former employer is truthful.
By clicking on %s button, you agreed to our
Please choose a company to review.
Please choose your job title at %1$s.
Please choose your job type at %1$s.
Please choose a company to review
Have you already applied to this job
Sorry!! Something went wrong. We\'re working hard to resolve it.
Google Maps is not installed or disabled.
Press back again to leave the application.

string-array.name: password_regex_validation_invalid_message
string-array.item: Minimum 8 characters, at least 1 uppercase, 1 number and 1 special character!

resources.string: Must be between %d and %d characters long.
Please input your first name and last name
Please input a valid phone number
Your trust is our top concern, so companies cannot alter or remove salaries.
%s, we\'re sorry to see you go. We\'ll miss your contributions to the community. We hope to see you again
Tell us the reason for deactivating your account
Are you sure you want to continue? Any changes made after this step will be reset.
Please select a job to invite
Notify to you new updates from connections
This website has a problem with its security certificate.
We have sent a confirmation email to %s. Please follow the instructions to complete your registration
If you don’t see the email, check your spam or junk folder.
Please grant read contact permission to sync contact
At least State or City must input data
Please select staff for your service
Number of months not greater than 720
Please move your camera over the QR code for scanning
Please grant permission to this feature
The QR code is not valid
Everyone can easily find and connect you\nby scanning your QR code
I am very excited to start my new job!
I\'m excited to share that I\'ll be starting a new role as %s at %s
Celebrating a new milestone in education
I am excited to share my educational milestone! %s
Do you want to post a celebration for this event?
No QR code detected in the image
